epigraph: “The early morning has gold in its mouth.” — Franklin

weather.narrative: Drizzle through the morning, easing by afternoon. Take a coat for the school run.

lead.headline: Teresa's resignation requires immediate transition planning
lead.deck: With no due date flagged, this personnel matter needs to move from task list to action plan. Clarity on timing and coverage is essential before other priorities can settle.
